class UserWriter:
    def __init__(self, db):
        self.db = db

    def create_user(self, username: str, email: str) -> dict:
        user = {"username": username, "email": email}
        self.db.insert("users", user)
        return user

    def delete_user(self, user_id: int) -> None:
        self.db.delete("users", user_id)

    def update_user(self, user_id: int, data: dict) -> None:
        self.db.update("users", user_id, data)


class UserReader:
    def __init__(self, db):
        self.db = db

    def get_user(self, user_id: int) -> dict:
        return self.db.find("users", user_id)

    def list_users(self) -> list[dict]:
        return self.db.findall("users")

    def count_users(self) -> int:
        return self.db.count("users")

    def search_users(self, query: str) -> list[dict]:
        return self.db.search("users", query)
